issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as tool failures or false positives.

scenarios.name: Automated scan of a search endpoint for reflected XSS using the right tools
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggested Burp/manual payloads and never named dalfox; treatment used the skill's exact dalfox url ... --skip-bav (and dalfox file ... --output) plus XSStrike's python3 xsstrike.py -u ... --fuzzer commands.

scenarios.name: Implement a strict nonce-based CSP that blocks injected scripts
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced a reasonable CSP but lacked frame-ancestors 'none' and base-uri 'self' and was vague on per-request nonce generation; treatment matched the skill's CSP block (default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'nonce-{random}'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self') with the server-generated nonce flow.
